Issue: Phone-frame UI not constrained; stretches edge-to-edge >=768px (no maxWidth)
Expected: Centered phone-width column (~390-430px) or true desktop layout
Recommended Fix: Add maxWidth+alignSelf center to Screen container

Issue: Errors/success use native window.alert/confirm on web (unstyled, blocking)
Recommended Fix: Add shared Toast/Snackbar; replace Alert for non-destructive feedback

Issue: No semantic headings/landmarks (RN-web divs); h1/h3 visual only
White-on-accent ~2.5:1, ink3 captions ~2.4:1 fail WCAG AA
Recommended Fix: Darker ink on accent or darker accent; caption -> ink2

Issue: No visible focus ring; text-as-link not keyboard-focusable
Errors via Alert; not tied to inputs (no aria-describedby/role=alert)
Recommended Fix: Route validation into Field error; aria-describedby; liveRegion

Issue: No hover state on web (only pressed)
Drawer is fade Modal; no slide/edge-swipe
Map shows placeholder on web (no web support)
Recommended Fix: Web map fallback (Leaflet/Google JS) or hide Mapa tab on web

Issue: No in-screen error/retry state on fetch failure
'com seguro' badge shows but no toggle UI to enable coverage

Expected: All spec items or explicit 'em breve'
Recommended Fix: Build missing screens or mark coming-soon

Issue: Icon set swapped to lucide; glyph drift vs prototype; pix->QrCode approx
Recommended Fix: Acceptable; restore custom set if pixel-match required

Issue: Mobile chrome (84px tab bar, FAB, floating toggle) stranded on desktop
Expected: Constrained phone column or desktop nav

Issue: FOUT / blank until fonts load (_layout returns null)
Expected: Preload + font-display swap; splash not blank

Issue: Some actions are <44px text links, no button role
Android 17 emulator 16KB compat dialog over app
Recommended Fix: Environment-only; use dev/native build on stable image
